product: Genie feedback workflow and security enhancements
tagline: Revamped feedback flow in Genie: The Genie feedback workflow is now more interactive and responsive.
what_it_does: Revamped feedback flow in Genie: The Genie feedback workflow is now more interactive and responsive. When a response is incorrect, you can explain why it's wrong by choosing from a selection of common issues or entering your own explanation. You can regenerate the response based on the feedback you provide, or send it to a space editor for manual review.
why_it_matters: Serverless workspaces: The workspace's default storage | Classic workspaces: Workspace storage Serverless workspaces: Managed services | | Interactive notebook results | Classic workspaces: By default, when you run a notebook interactively (rather than as a job) results are stored in the control plane for performance with some large results stored in your workspace storage bucket in your AWS account.
use_cases: Data in the Databricks control plane
key_takeaway: Revamped feedback flow in Genie: The Genie feedback workflow is now more interactive and responsive.
